title: Traveller caravan count: January 2025
body: "Data from the count of Traveller caravans in England which took place on or around 16 January 2025. The twice-yearly count takes place in January and July, recording the number of caravans on both authorised and unauthorised sites across England.  Since 2011, each January count has included a count of caravans occupied by Travelling Showpeople in each local authority in England. Travelling Showpeople figures have therefore also been updated as part of this release. "
